name: Alchemy Lapis prism  Rice Chain Pendant Necklace
details:
Make a bold, royal statement with the Lapis Lazuli Crystal Rice Chain Pendant Necklace. Natural deep-blue Lapis Lazuli crystal chips are clustered at the centre and framed by a polished Multi-Colouredrice-style chain, creating a striking contrast that instantly elevates any outfit.

Each intense royal-blue stone may carry natural Multi-Colouredor earthy inclusions, giving every piece an authentic, one-of-a-kind gemstone character. No two necklaces are ever exactly alike. Lapis Lazuli has long been associated with wisdom, confidence, communication and self-expression.

The structured Multi-Colouredbar-link chain adds a modern luxury touch, while the naturally shaped stone chips keep the design distinctive and artistic. An adjustable lobster clasp lets it sit comfortably and layer beautifully with your other gold-tone pieces.

Key features

Natural Lapis Lazuli crystal chips in a deep royal-blue shade
Genuine natural inclusions and stone-to-stone variation
Polished Multi-Colouredrice-style bar-link chain
Adjustable lobster-clasp closure for a flexible fit
Statement look in a lightweight, comfortable design
Suitable for daily wear, formal wear and festive occasions
Crystal meaning

Lapis Lazuli is traditionally known as a symbol of wisdom, confidence, truth and self-expression. Its royal-blue tone has been treasured in jewellery for centuries.

Styling suggestion

Pair it with white, navy blue, black, cream or Multi-Colouredoutfits. It looks especially premium with formal and festive clothing, and layers beautifully with other gold-tone pieces. Multi-Coloured Rice Chain

If you love jewellery that feels fun, stylish, and effortlessly premium, this Multi-Coloured Rice Chain is made for you.

The Rice Chain is known for its fine textured link pattern that gives the chain a smooth, structured, and polished look around the neckline. Its sleek rice-style design adds a clean luxurious finish, while the multi-coloured detailing brings a fresh, trendy, and eye-catching twist to your everyday jewellery look.

Designed with a 3 mm width and 51 cm length, the multi-coloured finish adds a playful modern shine, while the durable chain structure makes it easy to wear again and again. Lightweight, anti-tarnish, and skin-friendly, this chain is designed for comfort, style, and long-lasting everyday use with proper care.

Wear it solo for a colourful statement or layer it with pendants and other chains for a more fashionable jewellery stack. A chic, versatile, and aesthetic chain that instantly makes your outfit look more stylish and expressive.

Styling Tip: Pair it with a solid tee, shirt, dress, kurti, blazer, or neutral outfit to let the multi-coloured chain stand out beautifully.
